mapper.insert:
SELECT 'USERS_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '_' || LPAD( NVL( MAX( TO_NUMBER( SUBSTR(user_id, 14) ) ), 0 ) + 1, 4, '0' ) FROM users WHERE user_id LIKE 'USERS_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '_%'
INSERT INTO users ( user_id, login_id, password, user_name, email, phone ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{loginId}, #{password}, #{userName}, #{email}, #{phone} )
mapper.select: SELECT user_id ,login_id ,password ,user_name ,email ,phone ,identity_verified_yn AS authYN ,subscribe_yn FROM users WHERE login_id = #{loginId}
SELECT user_id ,login_id ,password ,user_name ,email ,phone ,identity_verified_yn ,subscribe_yn FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT p.project_id AS "projectId" ,p.owner_id AS "ownerId" ,p.project_name AS "projectName" ,p.description ,p.project_url AS "projectUrl" ,p.status_code AS "statusCode" ,p.start_date AS "startDate" ,p.end_date AS "endDate" ,p.created_at AS "createdAt" ,c.note AS "statusName" ,owner.user_name AS "ownerName" FROM project p LEFT JOIN users owner ON p.owner_id = owner.user_id LEFT JOIN common_code c ON p.status_code = c.code_id AND c.code_name = '0A' WHERE p.owner_id = #{userId} OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM project_member pm JOIN team_member tm ON pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id WHERE pm.project_id = p.project_id AND tm.user_id = #{userId} ) ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
